zh.lifeSummary: 當William ap Hywel於大約1260年出生在英國威爾斯拉德諾斯爾米可艾爾其 奧 阿洛時，他的父親Hywel Ap Meurig21歲，母親de Clanvow21歲。他於1285年與Elizabeth Verch Howell在英國英格蘭賀福爾亞結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1286年在英國威爾斯享年27歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William ap Hywel于大约1260年出生在英国威尔斯拉德諾斯爾米可艾爾其 奧 阿洛时，他的父亲Hywel Ap Meurig21岁，母亲de Clanvow21岁。他于1285年与Elizabeth Verch Howell在英国英格兰賀福爾亞结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1286年在英国威尔斯享年27岁。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Long, Minh, Muoi, Phan, Phat, Vinh, Cuong, Hien, Hoa, Lam, Lan.  Chinese Wing, Chi, Kin, Cheuk, Chi Wai, Chuen, Hon, Keung, Wah, Wai, Chiu, Ho.
Chinese: alternative Mandarin form of the surname 敖, see   Ao  .
Chinese: Cantonese form of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Auerbach
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Moshe, Emanuel, Isidor, Bronia, Chaim, Faigy, Menachem, Meyer, Yechezkel.
German: habitational name from any of several places in southern Germany and Austria called Auerbach ‘the stream at the water meadow’. See also 2,   Au  , and   Bach  .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from the town of Auerbach in the Upper Palatinate, Bavaria. Compare   Averbach  .

variants.name: Ao
meanings: Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 敖, meaning both ‘rambling’ and ‘deposed king without posthumous titles’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the personal name of Tai Ao (太敖), teacher of the legendary king Zhuanxu (traditional dates: 2514–2437 BC ). (ii) it is said that the surname is also borne by descendants of deposed kings of the former state of Chu, with no posthumous titles, during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ).

variants.name: Auer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Alois, Hans, Erwin, Matthias, Siegfried, Bernd, Bernhard, Erna, Franz, Fritz, Hermann, Horst.

German (mainly Bavaria): topographic name for someone living by a water meadow, German Au, or a habitational name for someone from a place called Au or Aue (see Au and Aue ). This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Czechia, and Slovenia.

nameMeanings.name: Hywel
meanings: A Welsh name. Some write the name Hoel, which they render 'lordly;' if so, it may come from huail, a vice-regent, regent. Arthur derives the surname Howell from Corn. -Brit, houl, the sun; and he adds, high, exalted.' But Hywel is rather from hywel, conspicuous.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William ap Hywel was born about 1260, in Michaelchurch on Arrow, Radnorshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Hywel Ap Meurig, was 21 and his mother, de Clanvow, was 21. He married Elizabeth Verch Howell in 1285, in Yazor, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1286, in Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 27.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William ap Hywel est né environ 1260, à Michaelchurch on Arrow, Radnorshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Hywel Ap Meurig, avait 21 ans et sa mère, de Clanvow, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Verch Howell en 1285, à Yazor, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1286, à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 27 ans.

Er hat 1285 in Yazor, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Verch Howell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1286 im Alter von 27 Jahren in Wales, United Kingdom.

Lui sposato Elizabeth Verch Howell nel 1285, nel Yazor, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1286, nel Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 27 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William ap Hywelが約1260年にイギリスウェールズラドノーシュアイアミチャエルチャーチ オン アローで生まれた時，父Hywel Ap Meurigは21歳，母de Clanvowは21歳であった。1285年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアヤゾルでElizabeth Verch Howellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1286年にイギリスウェールズで27歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William ap Hywel(이)가 대략 1260년 영국 웨일스 라드노르실르 믹하얼c후르치  아로에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hywel Ap Meurig(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 de Clanvow(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1285년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 야즈어에서 Elizabeth Verch Howell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1286년 영국 웨일스에서 27세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William ap Hywel родился около 1260 г. в местности мачаелчурч он арроу, радноршир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Hywel Ap Meurig было 21 год, а матери, которую звали de Clanvow, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Verch Howell в 1285 г. в местности язор, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1286 г. в местности Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 27 лет.
